name: Millennia Credit Card

domestic: Either ₹1,000 gift voucher or 1 domestic lounge access voucher on spends of ₹1,00,000 and above in each calendar quarter

specialSpendRules.notes: Education payments made directly through school or college websites or POS machines earn rewards; third-party app payments do not.

milestones.label: Either ₹1,000 gift voucher or 1 domestic lounge access voucher on spends of ₹1,00,000 and above in each calendar quarter

milestoneBenefits: Either ₹1,000 gift voucher or 1 domestic lounge access voucher on spends of ₹1,00,000 and above in each calendar quarter

joiningBenefitsValued.label: 1,000 CashPoints on payment of joining or renewal membership fee, equivalent to the fee amount (counted under renewal — granted every fee cycle)

joiningBenefits: 1,000 CashPoints on payment of joining or renewal membership fee, equivalent to the fee amount

renewalBenefitsValued.label: 1,000 CashPoints on payment of the renewal membership fee, equivalent to the fee amount

renewalBenefits: 1,000 CashPoints on payment of the renewal membership fee, equivalent to the fee amount
additionalBenefits: 5% cashback on Amazon, BookMyShow, Cult.fit, Flipkart, Myntra, Sony LIV, Swiggy, Tata CLiQ, Uber and Zomato
Up to 10% cashback across 200+ brands via SmartBuy/PayZapp Shop
10% additional discount on Swiggy Dineout using coupon code HDFCCARDS
1% fuel surcharge waiver at fuel stations across India on transactions from ₹400 to ₹5,000
additionalDetails: CashPoints are posted on a calendar-month basis, with settled transactions from the 1st to the 30th/31st posted in the first week of the subsequent calendar month
Reward Points on flights and hotels via SmartBuy redeem at 1 CashPoint = ₹1, capped at 50,000 CashPoints per calendar month and up to 50% of booking value
Reward Points for cashback redemption are capped at 3,000 per calendar month
Unredeemed CashPoints expire within 2 years of accumulation
internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-05-31
Audited against official HDFC Bank Millennia product page, terms PDF, lounge voucher PDF, FAQ PDF and fee-waiver page on 2026-05-31.

Effective 1st December 2023, complimentary domestic airport lounge access is no longer directly available on Millennia Credit Card; lounge access is now integrated into the quarterly milestone choice between a ₹1,000 voucher and a lounge voucher.
Effective 1st September 2024, wallet loading and EMI transactions do not earn Reward Points.
Effective 1st September 2024, education payments made through third-party apps do not earn Reward Points, but direct school or college website and POS transactions do earn rewards.
Reward points redemption for cashback is capped at 3,000 CashPoints per calendar month.
Flights and hotels redemption is capped at 50,000 CashPoints per calendar month and up to 50% of booking value.
